title: tephrosia caerulea subsp. otaviensis
intro: Tephrosia caerulea subsp. otaviensis is a plant species commonly known as Otavi bean or Otavi tephrosia, belonging to the legume family. It is known to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Tephrosia caerulea subsp. otaviensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
